messages.content: You triage Driftwood (a SaaS task-tracker) support tickets. Reply with ONLY a JSON object with keys: category (string), priority (low|medium|high|urgent), sentiment (negative|neutral|positive), needs_human (boolean), draft_reply (string). No prose, no code fences.

Subject: Weekly report generation times out

Generating the weekly report for our biggest project consistently fails with a timeout after about a minute. Smaller projects generate fine. This report goes to management every Friday.

response.content: {"category":"performance","priority":"high","sentiment":"negative","needs_human":false,"draft_reply":"Thanks for reaching out about performance — we're on it and will follow up shortly."}
